title: Elderly Mossel Bay woman (80) and child (5) reported missing
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police in Mossel Bay are asking for assistance in locating 80-year-old Barbara Tier and five-year-old Britney Pekeur.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police in Mossel Bay are asking for assistance in locating 80-year-old Barbara Tier and five-year-old Britney Pekeur."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The two were last seen leaving their residence in Fairview, a residential area near Hotel Portao Diaz at 10:00 today, 12 October and have not been seen since."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to a statement released by Sergeant Wesley Twigg of the Office of the Provincial Police Commissioner today, Tier was wearing a purple tracksuit pants, a dark top and black boots.","html":"According to a statement released by Sergeant Wesley Twigg of the Office of the Provincial Police Commissioner today, Tier was wearing a purple tracksuit pants, a dark top and black boots."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pekeur was wearing a blue tracksuit with crocs shoes.","html":"Pekeur was wearing a blue tracksuit with crocs shoes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with any information who can assist with the investigation or who knows the whereabouts of the two missing persons, are encouraged to contact Lieutenant-Colonel Edy Williams on 082 551 9124 or Crime Stop on 086 001 0111.","html":"Anyone with any information who can assist with the investigation or who knows the whereabouts of the two missing persons, are encouraged to contact Lieutenant-Colonel Edy Williams on 082 551 9124 or Crime Stop on 086 001 0111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Barbara Tier.","html":"Barbara Tier. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
